ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the listing */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the listing */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the listing */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the firearm */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the listing was posted */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the firearm (e.g., handguns, rifles) */,
  "manufacturer" INTEGER /* Manufacturer of the firearm */,
  "caliber" INTEGER /* Caliber of the firearm */,
  "action" INTEGER /* Action type of the firearm (e.g., semi-automatic, double action) */,
  "firearm_type" INTEGER /* Type of firearm (e.g., pistol, rifle) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the firearm (e.g., new, used, excellent, good, fair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the firearm */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the firearm */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, sold, expired) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the listing */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the firearm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_firearm_type FOREIGN KEY ("firearm_type") REFERENCES firearm_types ("firearm_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_caliber FOREIGN KEY ("caliber") REFERENCES calibers ("caliber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibers" (
  "caliber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caliber */,
  "caliber_name" TEXT /* Name of the caliber */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the caliber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caliber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearm_types" (
  "firearm_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firearm type */,
  "firearm_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the firearm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the firearm type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firearm_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., dealer, individual) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Firearm license number of the user */,
  "license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the user's firearm license */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing the message is related to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /*  Whether the message has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the listing */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the listing was viewed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Category of the firearm (e.g., handguns, rifles)
Action type of the firearm (e.g., semi-automatic, double action)
Condition of the firearm (e.g., new, used, excellent, good, fair)

ID of the user receiving the message

ID of the user viewing the listing
